doc_content.summary: The stark-rename-project skill safely renames a repository locally and on GitHub, automatically updating git remotes, reinstalling symlinks, and propagating the name change across all related sibling repositories in the same parent directory.
key_features: Safe GitHub and local directory renaming
Automated reference updating across sibling repositories with auto-commit
Intelligent regex and literal string replacement with safety exclusions

alt_text: A visual workflow diagram and usage guide for the stark-rename-project skill, showing the 8-phase process from validation to summary report, including dry-run paths, artifact updates, and safety checks.
